candidate_check.description: Windows Server 2025 must be configured to audit Policy Change - Authorization Policy Change successes.

check_content_excerpt:
Security Option "Audit: Force audit policy subcategory settings (Windows 7 or later) to override audit policy category settings" must be set to "Enabled" (WN25-SO-000050) for the detailed auditing subcategories to be effective. 

Use the "AuditPol" tool to review the current Audit Policy configuration.

Open PowerShell or a command prompt with elevated privileges ("Run as administrator").

Enter "AuditPol /get /category:*"

Compare the "AuditPol" settings with the following.

If the system does not audit the following, this is a finding:

Policy Change >> Authorization Policy Change - Success
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Windows Settings >> Security Settings >> Advanced Audit Policy Configuration >> System Audit Policies >> Policy Change >> Audit Authorization Policy Change with "Success" selected.
title: Windows Server 2025 must be configured to audit Policy Change - Authorization Policy Change successes.
